visual_summary: A terminal UI component with animated typing and colorful status messages. This component is used for displaying command line outputs, status updates, and success messages.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: Terminal Demo
Description: A terminal UI component with animated typing and colorful status messages. This component is used for displaying command line outputs, status updates, and success messages.
Style: animated, colorful, typographic
Interactions: animate typing, hover, clickable text
Tags: terminal, console, output, status

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import {
  AnimatedSpan,
  Terminal,
  TypingAnimation,
} from "@/registry/magicui/terminal"

export default function TerminalDemo() {
  return (
    <Terminal>
      <TypingAnimation>> pnpm dlx shadcn@latest init</TypingAnimation>

      <AnimatedSpan className="text-green-500">
        ✔ Preflight checks.
      </AnimatedSpan>

      <AnimatedSpan className="text-green-500">
        ✔ Verifying framework. Found Next.js.
      </AnimatedSpan>

      <AnimatedSpan className="text-green-500">
